description: PR90 Phase 18 — Audit export for multi-step plan review and resume. Shows trace event sequence from plan start through review suspension, human approval, cursor-based resume, and plan completion.

auditSequence.description: Agent run began for 3-step sequential plan.
Sequential plan execution started.
Step s1 started.
s1 tool call started (pr1.fake-tool, policy: Allow).
Step s1 completed successfully.
Step s2 started.
Policy evaluated for s2 tool (pr1.high-risk-fake-tool): RequiresReview.
Plan execution suspended at s2 pending human review.
Run status set to RequiresReview.
Resume cursor recorded: 1 remaining step (s3) after the blocked step s2.
Human reviewer approved the blocked tool call. Decision recorded (does not canonize knowledge).
Run status returned to Running for approved tool execution.
Post-approval policy re-evaluated for s2 tool: Allowed (resume context).
s2 tool call started after approval.
s2 tool call completed.
Step s2 completed.
Resume cursor cleared; beginning multi-step continuation.
Multi-step plan resuming 1 remaining step (s3) after approval of s2.
Policy evaluated for resumed step s3 (pr1.fake-tool): Allowed.
s3 tool call started (resumed).
Resumed step s3 completed.
Multi-step plan execution completed after human review resume.
Agent run completed. All 3 plan steps executed (s1 before review, s2 approved, s3 resumed).

auditInvariants: No Athanor canonization events appear in this trace.
HumanReviewDecisionRecorded explicitly states the non-canonization invariant.
PlanResumeCursorCleared appears between ToolCallCompleted and MultiStepPlanResumed.
